info.title: AI Financial Advisor - Web Search Service
info.description: A small FastAPI microservice that provides a unified web search API for the AI Financial Advisor agent. This service should be used for general information lookup that is *not* strictly tied to the Trade Engine's quantitative market data.

schema.title: Response Liveness Check Health Live Get
Response Readiness Check Health Ready Get

get.description:
Perform a general web search via an external provider and return
a compact, LLM-friendly JSON structure.

Requires: authenticated Supabase JWT in the Authorization header.
Rate-limited per authenticated user.

parameters.name: max_results

schema.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-10).
schema.title: Max Results

parameters.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-10).

schema.title: Response Search Web Api Search Get

post.description: Create or update Meridian profile and first goal; schedule an IRIS cache refresh.

schema.title: Response Meridian Onboard Api Meridian Onboard Post

post.description: Refresh the IRIS context cache for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Meridian Refresh Context Api Meridian Refresh Context Post

post.description:
Daily cron endpoint: refreshes ai.iris_context_cache for ALL users.
In production this requires a Supabase service-role JWT.
Non-production keeps the legacy shared-secret fallback so local schedulers
and smoke tests can still exercise the path without minting a JWT.

Schedule: 0 2 * * * (daily at 02:00 UTC)

schema.title: Response Meridian Refresh All Api Meridian Refresh All Post
Response Chat Title Api Chat Title Post
Response Analyze Quantitative Data Api Ai Analyze Quantitative Post

get.description:
Stub endpoint for news.

Note: News articles are stored in Supabase (news_articles table).
This endpoint returns empty results to prevent 404 errors.
The frontend should use Supabase directly for news.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of news items to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of news items to return

schema.title: Response Get News Api News Get

get.description:
Get comprehensive AI context for the chatbot.

Use `source=dataapi` to fetch from TheEyeBetaDataAPI (live engine data),
`source=auto` to try DataAPI first with stub fallback, or `source=supabase`
(default) for the original stub behavior.

parameters.name: signals_hours

schema.description: Hours of signal history to include
schema.title: Signals Hours

parameters.description: Hours of signal history to include

parameters.name: source

schema.description: Data source: supabase, dataapi, or auto
schema.title: Source

parameters.description: Data source: supabase, dataapi, or auto

get.description:
Get recent trading signals.

Use `source=dataapi` or `source=auto` to fetch from TheEyeBetaDataAPI.
Default (supabase) returns empty list (Trade Engine not deployed).

schema.description: Filter by signal type (BUY, SELL, HOLD)

get.description:
Return the last known price for a ticker.

Uses Supabase by default. Set `source=dataapi` or `source=auto` to
fetch from TheEyeBetaDataAPI.

parameters.name: source

schema.description: Data source: supabase, dataapi, or auto
schema.title: Source

parameters.description: Data source: supabase, dataapi, or auto

schema.title: Response Get Stock Price Api Stock Price  Ticker  Get

get.description:
Return the pre-computed top stocks from market.trending_stocks.

Scores are refreshed once daily at 01:00 UTC by the background ranking
engine.  `data_age_hours` tells you how fresh the data is.

Filters:
- `min_score`: only return stocks with composite_score >= this value
- `rank_tier`: only return stocks matching this tier label

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Number of top stocks to return (max 50)
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Number of top stocks to return (max 50)

get.description:
Return live snapshot data for a single ticker from market.stock_snapshots,
combined with the most recent balanced-horizon ranking row.

Returns 404 if the ticker is not found in stock_snapshots.
Returns ranking: null if no ranking history exists for the ticker.
Return comprehensive system health across all services.

schema.title: Response System Health Api Admin System Health Get

get.description: Proxy a read-only SQL query to the DataAPI admin endpoint.

get.description:
Return last-run timestamps for each scheduled job, inferred from the database.

Never raises — always returns a valid response even if all DB queries fail.

AIContextResponse.description: Full AI context response matching frontend TradeEngineAIContext interface.
